vivid/color/bg/canvas.$description: The default page background colour, used as the base canvas for application layouts and large surface areas.

vivid/color/bg/surface/default.$description: The default background colour for primary UI surfaces such as cards, panels, and containers.

vivid/color/bg/surface/muted.$description: A soft surface background used to subtly distinguish sections, grouped content, or secondary containers.

vivid/color/bg/surface/subtle.$description: A lightly emphasised surface background used to create gentle separation between layers of content.

vivid/color/bg/surface/strong.$description: A stronger neutral surface background used for higher emphasis containers or more pronounced visual separation.

vivid/color/bg/surface/inverted.$description: An inverted surface background used for dark surfaces, overlays, or areas requiring high contrast against light UI.

vivid/color/bg/neutral/strong.$description: A high-emphasis neutral background used for strong visual weight, prominent containers, or inverse UI treatments.

vivid/color/bg/neutral/muted.$description: A low-emphasis neutral background used for subtle fills, background accents, or secondary neutral surfaces.

vivid/color/bg/primary/strong.$description: A strong primary background used for prominent branded surfaces, key actions, or high-emphasis primary UI elements.

vivid/color/bg/primary/muted.$description: A subtle primary-tinted background used to communicate brand presence with low visual emphasis.

vivid/color/bg/announcement/strong.$description: A strong accent background used to highlight secondary branded elements or areas of visual emphasis.

vivid/color/bg/announcement/muted.$description: A subtle accent-tinted background used for gentle emphasis, decoration, or supporting accent surfaces.

vivid/color/bg/info/strong.$description: A strong informational background used for prominent info states, highlighted messages, or emphasis surfaces.

vivid/color/bg/info/muted.$description: A subtle informational background used for low-emphasis messaging, status surfaces, or informational highlights.

vivid/color/bg/danger/strong.$description: A strong danger background used for prominent danger states, highlighted messages, or emphasis surfaces.

vivid/color/bg/danger/muted.$description: A subtle danger background used for low-emphasis messaging, status surfaces, or danger highlights.

vivid/color/bg/warning/strong.$description: A strong warning background used for prominent warning states, highlighted messages, or emphasis surfaces.

vivid/color/bg/warning/muted.$description: A subtle warning background used for low-emphasis messaging, status surfaces, or warning highlights.

vivid/color/bg/success/strong.$description: A strong success background used for prominent success states, highlighted messages, or emphasis surfaces.

vivid/color/bg/success/muted.$description: A subtle success background used for low-emphasis messaging, status surfaces, or success highlights.

vivid/color/bg/disabled.$description: A background color used to indicate disabled states or non-interactive surfaces.
